description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body and a slightly rounded head. Its plumage is primarily a muted brownish-gray, with subtle gradients of lighter and darker tones along the wings and underbelly. The beak is short, straight, and pointed, typical of many urban passerine birds. The tail is moderately long and appears slightly rounded at the tip, with some feather wear visible. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall body proportions suggest a perching bird commonly found in city parks or gardens. The surface texture of the feathers is matte, with a soft, natural appearance and no glossy reflection.
description: A small, brownish-gray bird with a streamlined body, short pointed beak, and a slightly rounded tail. Its plumage is matte and subtly gradient, typical of urban passerines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, short pointed beak, and subtle feather gradients.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail and the symmetry of the bird's back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible feather texture and tail details.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head and beak, with the body tapering toward the tail.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradients and slight mottling on wings and underbelly
